ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., New York Stock Exchange) */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., equity, commodity, currency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the market */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the market */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the market is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the market */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the data belongs to */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update from the source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last price of the stock */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the stock traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount for the given date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient for the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the price data was obtained */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price record was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the indicator belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the indicator was calculated */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., SMAVG, EMA, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator was calculated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used to calculate the indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator record was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_indicator_type FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_type") REFERENCES indicator_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator type (e.g., SMAVG, EMA, RSI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator type */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator type was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dashboard record */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dashboard is public or private */,
  "last_viewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the dashboard was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert belongs to */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above/below, volume above/below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert record */,
  "last_triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert is currently active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES alert_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition type */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition type (e.g., price above/below, volume above/below) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition type was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the condition type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model record */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_trained_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last training of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted stock price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prediction record */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "actual_price" REAL /* Actual price of the stock on the prediction date (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
